title: Attack on protesters at Galle Face: Johnston released on bail
body_lines: Making a fresh order regarding former Minister Johnston Fernando, the Colombo Fort Magistrate today ordered to release him on bail in connection with the attacks took place at Galle Face.
Accordingly, Magistrate Thilina Gamage ordered to release Johnston Fernando on two sureties of one million rupees.(Lakmal Sooriyagoda)
